summary: Regional managers submit weekly updates in inconsistent formats (email, Notion, spreadsheets), requiring 3-4 hours of manual consolidation each Monday. Customer requests AI-assisted drafting of leadership briefings with mandatory human review before posting to Notion.

stakeholders.name: Maya Chen
stakeholders.interest: Reduce time spent consolidating regional updates into leadership briefings; ensure output accuracy and proper action item assignment

stakeholders.name: Luis Ortega
stakeholders.interest: Coordinate solution delivery and customer alignment

stakeholders.name: Operations lead
stakeholders.interest: Review and approve AI-drafted briefings before posting to Notion

risks.description: Team needs to trust AI output quality before adopting the workflow
Action items may be assigned to wrong person if AI misinterprets input
Inconsistent input formats from regional managers may affect extraction accuracy

next_steps.action: Start with one region and one weekly briefing as pilot
next_steps.notes: Scope defined by customer as success criteria for first version

open_questions: Which region should be selected for the pilot?
Who is the specific operations lead that will serve as approver?
What is the current Notion workspace structure for posting briefings?
Are there existing templates or examples of completed leadership briefings?
What is the process if the operations lead rejects or requests changes to a draft?
